   "source": [
    "# Spectrogram: 基本\n",
    "\n",
    "[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tatsuki-washimi/gwexpy/blob/main/docs/web/en/user_guide/tutorials/intro_spectrogram.ipynb)\n",
    "\n",
    "このノートブックでは、`gwexpy` で新しく導入された `SpectrogramList` および `SpectrogramDict` クラスの使い方を紹介します。\n",
    "\n",
    "これらのクラスは、複数のスペクトログラムデータ（`gwpy.spectrogram.Spectrogram`）をまとめて管理し、一括して処理（クロップ、再ビン化、プロットなど）を行うためのコンテナです。\n",
    "時系列データを扱う `TimeSeriesList` / `TimeSeriesDict` と似たインターフェースを持っていますが、2次元データ（時間 × 周波数）を扱う点が特徴です。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "de74dcce",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-24T03:36:44.489057Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-24T03:36:44.487910Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.014653Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.013166Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 10.537195,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.015458+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:44.478263+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import warnings\n",
    "\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=UserWarning)\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\", category=DeprecationWarning)\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.noise.wave import gaussian, sine\n",
    "from gwexpy.spectrogram import SpectrogramDict, SpectrogramList"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "32582f3a",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.013116,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.063304+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.050188+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. データの準備\n",
    "\n",
    "まずはデモ用のスペクトログラムデータを作成します。\n",
    "ここでは、異なる周波数のサイン波を含む時系列データを生成し、それを `spectrogram()` メソッドで変換して使用します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "19b33bf8",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.098351Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.097820Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.678236Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.672767Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.593849,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.679269+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.085420+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Spectrogram shape: (10, 65)\n",
      "Time range: [0.0 ... 20.0)\n",
      "Freq range: [0.0 ... 65.0)\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Create sample data\n",
    "duration = 20  # seconds\n",
    "sample_rate = 128  # Hz\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create sine waves at 10Hz, 30Hz, 50Hz (+noise)\n",
    "noise_amp = 0.1\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def make_signal(freq, name):\n",
    "    s = sine(duration=duration, sample_rate=sample_rate, frequency=freq, amplitude=1.0)\n",
    "    n = gaussian(duration=duration, sample_rate=sample_rate, std=noise_amp)\n",
    "    ts = s + n\n",
    "    ts.name = name\n",
    "    ts.override_unit(\"strain\")\n",
    "    return ts\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "ts1 = make_signal(10, \"Signal 10Hz\")\n",
    "ts2 = make_signal(30, \"Signal 30Hz\")\n",
    "ts3 = make_signal(50, \"Signal 50Hz\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Calculate spectrograms (stride=2s, fftlength=1s)\n",
    "# Specify nproc=1 for stability with serial execution\n",
    "spec1 = ts1.spectrogram(2, fftlength=1, overlap=0.5, nproc=1)\n",
    "spec2 = ts2.spectrogram(2, fftlength=1, overlap=0.5, nproc=1)\n",
    "spec3 = ts3.spectrogram(2, fftlength=1, overlap=0.5, nproc=1)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Spectrogram shape:\", spec1.shape)\n",
    "print(\"Time range:\", spec1.xspan)\n",
    "print(\"Freq range:\", spec1.yspan)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0d1d79b0",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.014007,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.740820+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.726813+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 2. SpectrogramList の基本操作\n",
    "\n",
    "`SpectrogramList` はリストのように振る舞いますが、格納できるのは `Spectrogram` オブジェクトのみです。\n",
    "初期化時にリストを渡すか、`append()` メソッドで追加します。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "43285f98",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.848005Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.847762Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.858623Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.858106Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.025034,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.860578+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.835544+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "List length: 3\n",
      "Items: ['Signal 10Hz', 'Signal 30Hz', 'Signal 50Hz']\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Create a list\n",
    "spec_list = SpectrogramList([spec1, spec2])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Append\n",
    "spec_list.append(spec3)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"List length: {len(spec_list)}\")\n",
    "print(f\"Items: {[s.name for s in spec_list]}\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c72ea0d2",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.020097,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.932380+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.912283+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "### バッチ処理: 時間軸の切り出し (`crop`)\n",
    "\n",
    "リスト内のすべてのスペクトログラムに対して、一括で時間軸の切り出しを行います。\n",
    "**注意:** スペクトログラムはデータ量が大きいため、クロップなどの操作は元のデータを変更せず、新しいオブジェクト（コピー）を返すことがあります。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "dfb48fa0",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.959281Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.958765Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.971984Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.971411Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.025938,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.973100+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:55.947162+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Original range: [0.0 ... 20.0)\n",
      "Cropped range: [4.0 ... 14.0)\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Crop to 5-15 second range\n",
    "cropped_list = spec_list.crop(5, 15)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Original range:\", spec_list[0].xspan)\n",
    "print(\"Cropped range:\", cropped_list[0].xspan)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "62b582f5",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.015135,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:56.025487+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:36:56.010352+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [

    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "### バッチ処理: 周波数軸の切り出し (`crop_frequencies`)\n",
    "\n",
    "gwpyの `Spectrogram` に互換性のあるメソッドがあればそれを使用し、なければ周波数軸を指定してフィルタリングを行います。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "049e6ff7",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-24T03:36:56.051878Z",

     "output_type": "stream",

     ]
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      " [0.0 ... 65.0)\n",
      "Cropped yspan: [0.0 ... 40.0)\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Crop to 0Hz - 40Hz range\n",
    "freq_cropped = spec_list.crop_frequencies(0, 40)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Original yspan:\", spec_list[0].yspan)\n",
    "print(\"Cropped yspan:\", freq_cropped[0].yspan)\n",
    "# The third element containing the 50Hz signal will also have out-of-range portions cut"
   ]
  },

   "source": [
    "## 3. SpectrogramDict の利用\n",
    "\n",
    "名前（キー）付きで管理したい場合は `SpectrogramDict` が便利です。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",

     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [

     ]

   ],
   "source": [

    "print(\"Keys:\", list(spec_dict.keys()))"
   ]

   "source": [
    "## 5. 行列形式への変換と Deep Learning 連携\n",
    "\n",
    "`to_matrix()` を使用すると、各スペクトログラムを積み重ねた 3次元配列 `(Channels, Time, Frequency)` を持つ `SpectrogramMatrix` オブジェクトを作成できます。\n",
    "\n",
    "これは機械学習モデル（PyTorch, TensorFlowなど）への入力を作成する際に非常に便利です。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "f8eb967a",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-24T03:37:12.059941Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-24T03:37:12.059688Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-24T03:37:12.075486Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-24T03:37:12.071758Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.028383,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:37:12.076223+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:37:12.047840+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Matrix Type: <class 'gwexpy.spectrogram.matrix.SpectrogramMatrix'>\n",
      "Matrix Shape: (3, 10, 65)\n",
      "  (N_channels, N_time_steps, N_freq_bins)\n",
      "Time axis shape: (10,)\n",
      "Freq axis shape: (65,)\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "matrix = spec_list.to_matrix()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Matrix Type:\", type(matrix))\n",
    "print(\"Matrix Shape:\", matrix.shape)\n",
    "print(\"  (N_channels, N_time_steps, N_freq_bins)\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Accessing attributes\n",
    "print(\"Time axis shape:\", matrix.times.shape)\n",
    "print(\"Freq axis shape:\", matrix.frequencies.shape)"
   ]
  },

    "PyTorchやCuPyがインストールされていれば、そのままTensor等に変換可能です。\n",
    "\n",
    "```python\n",
    "# PyTorch Tensorへの変換\n",
    "# tensor = matrix.to_torch()\n",
    "```"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "5ce2b714",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.011034,
     "end_time": "2026-04-24T03:37:12.167030+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-24T03:37:12.155996+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## よくある落とし穴と失敗モード\n",
    "\n",
    "- **色の明るさをそのまま絶対振幅だと読むこと**: 正規化、カラースケール、対数表示の設定が違うと、同じデータでも印象が大きく変わります。\n",
    "- **時間分解能と周波数分解能を同時に高く見積もること**: `fftlength`、`stride`、window の選び方にはトレードオフがあり、画像で細く見える構造がそのまま物理的に鋭いとは限りません。\n",
    "- **軸のそろっていない図を直接比較すること**: `sharex` / `sharey` や表示範囲が一致していないと、差がスペクトル構造ではなく描画条件から生じます。\n",
    "- **切り出し後の結果を新しい推定だと誤解すること**: `crop` や `crop_frequencies` は表示・保持範囲を制限する操作であり、推定パラメータを変えて再計算したわけではありません。\n",
    "- **行列化した後に軸の意味を見失うこと**: `SpectrogramMatrix` は `(Channels, Time, Frequency)` の順です。軸入れ替えを誤ると、もっともらしいが誤った ML 入力になります。\n",
    "- **ノイズ床を無視してピークを解釈すること**: 明るい帯が見えても、背景ノイズ、リーケージ、推定条件との相対比較なしには有意性を判断できません。\n"
   ]
  },

    "これで `SpectrogramList` と `SpectrogramDict` の基本的な使い方の紹介を終わります。\n",
    "大量のスペクトログラムデータを一括で前処理したり、比較プロットを行う際にぜひ活用してください。"
